_comment: UJ portal — full field-option captures from the 2026-06-18/19 every-option walkthrough (synthetic Jane Doe, never submitted). Companion to uj.md. Bulk option data lives here, not in memory. Codes are the LOV PassBack values; descriptions are the visible row text. Lists captured live via the gw1lovbind LOV popups filtered to '%' (all).

oapOldNew.label: Do you already have a student number?

branches.Yes: inline message + CLICK HERE link to w99pkg.mi_login (existing-student route)

oapReturnYesNo.label: Are you returning to finalise an incomplete application?

branches.Yes: reveals ID Number + Passport Number + Resume application button

_adapter_critical_fixes.pageA_oapCitzCode_for_SA_citizen: When oapCitizenType='Y' (SA citizen), eventRun(5.4) hides oapCitzCodeGrp via CSS class (w3-hide), NOT inline style. changeToNameValuePairs only checks inline style.display at 3 parent levels. Fix: after eventRun(5.4) completes, also set document.getElementById('oapCitzCodeGrp').style.display='none' + set oapCitzCode='ZA' + oapCitzCode_desc='SOUTH AFRICA'. Without this, the save fails with 'Please supply missing/correct values'.
_adapter_critical_fixes.pageA_oapAcceptUnderAge: JSText_28.2 gates oapNextBtn2 on oapAcceptUnderAge checkbox. Jane DOB 14-MAY-2008 is still under 18 in June 2026. Must check the checkbox AND call its onclick handler: el.checked=true; if(el.onclick) el.onclick(). Without onclick(), the button remains disabled.
_adapter_critical_fixes.pageA_postal_code_desc: oapStreetAddrPCodeRq_desc and oapPostalAddrPCodeRq_desc are both mandatory='Y' and visible. They are LOV-backed description fields for the postal code. Must be set explicitly (e.g. '0152') in addition to the code field oapStreetAddrPCodeRq. Setting only the code field causes 'Please supply missing/correct values'.
_adapter_critical_fixes.pageC_JSText_46_enable_save_button: oapNextBtn3 is rendered with disabled='' (disabled by server). JSText_46 contains JS that enables it when getElementsByName('x_oapMSubj').length > 0 (i.e. subjects exist). However JSText_46 does NOT auto-execute on gw1view GET — only on the initial page render cycle. After navigating back to gw1view, must manually run: eval(document.getElementById('JSText_46').innerHTML). This was the root cause of the 'Page C save loops back' bug in previous sessions.
_adapter_critical_fixes.pageA_plus_1_NOK_page: After saving pageA (ITS_OAP02), the server advances to ITS_OAP02_1 (NOK + account holder page), NOT to pageC. The adapter must handle this intermediate page before reaching pageC. Page code check: document.getElementById('page_code').value === 'ITS_OAP02_1'.
_adapter_critical_fixes.school_lov_direct_fetch: The school LOV (oapSchool) can be fetched without opening the popup: GET gen.gw1pkg.gw1lovbind?x_thefilter=SOSHANGUVE%25&x_form_name=frmOne&x_item_name=oapSchool&x_item_desc=oapSchool_desc&x_lovcode=HASH&x_showcode=N&x_chksum=HASH2. Hashes are session-specific (from LOVHref_5.href). Result: 1730=SOSHANGUVE SECONDARY SCHOOL. Same fetch pattern works for all LOV fields on pages D and E.

oapCitizenType.label: Are you a SA Citizen in possession of a valid SA ID/Birth Certificate?

branches.Yes: reveals oapIDnumber + SA cell; entering valid SA ID auto-fills Citizenship Code=South Africa, derives gender+DOB, locks oapCellInd=Yes
branches.No: INTERNATIONAL/non-SA applicant branch: reveals oapPPnumber (Passport Number), oapStudyPermit (visa/permit type LOV, 17 options), oapGender (explicit F/M, since not derivable from ID), manual oapBirthdate, oapMaiden; oapCellInd becomes a Yes/No choice

oapStudyPermit.label: Study permit / visa type (international applicants only)

oapGender.label: Gender
oapGender.note: explicit only on international branch (oapCitizenType=No); for SA citizens it is derived from the ID

oapCellInd.label: Do you have a South African Cell Phone Number?

oapResReq.label: Do you want to apply for residence?

oapApplyDisability.label: Do you have a disability or impairment?

oapstudChkPostal.label: Tick if Postal Address differs from Street Address

pageB_nextofkin_account._note: This is a SEPARATE PAGE that appears after pageA (ITS_OAP02) and before pageC (ITS_OAP03). The adapter must handle this page in sequence. Captured 2026-06-20. Two sections: Next-of-Kin (NOK) and Fee-payer/Account-holder.

oapNokPostalAddrCode_desc.label: NOK Postal Code Desc
oapNokPostalAddrCode_desc.note: LOV-backed description field; must be set even if same value as code (e.g. '0152')

account_section._label: Particulars of Person Responsible for Your Account (fee payer)

oapAcntPostalCode_desc.note: same as NOK: must set _desc as well as code

ugpg_after_matric_year.label: Are you applying for Undergraduate or Post-graduate?
ugpg_after_matric_year.note: after a matric year is entered, the control switches to a UG-only select showing only Undergraduate

_subject_entry_mechanism.note: How to add a matric subject row programmatically (2026-06-19 breakthrough). Each Add (oapAddMatric) is a server postback that RESETS oapTypeMatric to -1 (cascade); re-assert it before every Add. The endorsement oapMatType code survives Adds.
_subject_entry_mechanism.validation_rule: Only the GRADE field strictly requires a real LOV round-trip (its _desc onblur fires eventRun(26.999)->callDynBGproc GRADE validation, which the server checks at Add). SUBJECT (oapMSubj/_desc, no handlers) and SYMBOL (oapsymbGr11, client-side onchange only) can be JS-set directly. Pure-JS-setting all three -> Add fails with alert 'Please supply missing/correct values'.
fast_flow_per_subject: CRITICAL: fire eventRun(26.999, oapMGrade_desc) — this is the server GRADE validation (callDynBGproc). Do NOT use the LOV popup path in fresh sessions (the LOV is gated until eventRun(5.4, oapCitizenType) + eventRun(16.999) have run; direct eventRun(26.999) bypasses this gate correctly).
WAIT 3 seconds for the async server callback to return (it clears symbol fields as a side-effect)
JS-set oapsymbGr11=' 75' + oapsymbGr11_desc='75' (space-padded width-3 for code)
fire eventRun(29.4, oapsymbGr11_desc) — client-side: enables oapAddMatric if Gr11 symbol non-empty
fire eventRun(37.4, oapsymbGr12_desc) — client-side: enables oapAddMatric if Gr12 symbol non-empty
JS-set oapTypeMatric='S' (re-assert; each Add resets it to -1; do NOT fire eventRun(16.999))
click oapAddMatric — navigates to gw1proc; navigate back to gw1view before next subject
_subject_entry_mechanism.symbol_format: oapsymbGr11 code value is right-justified width 3 with leading space, e.g. ' 75'; _desc is plain '75'.
_subject_entry_mechanism.save_to_pageD: oapNextBtn3 (Save and Continue). CRITICAL: JSText_46 gates this button — it checks getElementsByName('x_oapMSubj').length==0 and disables the button if no subjects. The JSText does NOT auto-execute on page load after gw1view navigation. Must run eval(document.getElementById('JSText_46').innerHTML) manually before clicking oapNextBtn3, or the button stays disabled even with subjects in the table. A 7-subject NSC set (MATH/ENHL/AFAL/LIORI/PHSC/LISC/GEOG) passes server validation.

oapStudUpgrade.label: Are you Upgrading your Gr 12 Results?
oapStudUpgrade.branch_note: Yes flags an upgrade; the matric entry row already contains hidden mark columns for Mid-Year Gr12 (oapmarkGr12j/oapsymbGr12j) and Final Gr12 (oapmarkGr12/oapsymbGr12) beyond the Gr11 symbol (oapsymbGr11). Which columns are REQUIRED is driven mainly by the ENDORSEMENT (applicant type), not the upgrade flag alone. Toggling upgrade did not delete already-committed subject rows.

oapTypeMatric.label: Are you completing or have completed a SA or International Matric
oapTypeMatric.branch_note: Setting International Matric (value 'I') reveals an Examination Number field (oapExamNum). SA Matric (value 'S') hides it. The 18-option endorsement LOV is a single combined list spanning both SA and international certificate types regardless of this toggle.

oapMatType_endorsement.label: Indicate your endorsement from your school leaving certificate (LOV)
oapMatType_endorsement._GATING: CRITICAL (2026-06-19): the endorsement LOV is FILTERED by (oapTypeMatric + oapMatYear). The 18 options below are the full SUPERSET (seen when matric-type is unset). applicant TYPE = function(matric-type, matric-year) -> allowed endorsements. The three practical subsets were captured live:

SA_currentYear_2026._meaning: current Gr.12 applicant (school leaver this year)

SA_pastYear_2024._meaning: completed-matric / gap-year / upgrading applicant; endorsement = the pass level achieved

oapMGrade.label: Grade (LOV)
oapMGrade.note: gated by endorsement; for CURRENTLY IN GR.12 + SA Matric only one option

oapMSubj_subjects.label: School Leaving Subject (LOV)
oapMSubj_subjects.note: full UJ school-subject catalogue. code = description (description carries the (NSC/NCV/ISC/DR) qualifier).

options.MTWMW: MECH TECH WELDING A METAL WORK
options.ROYPL: ROYAL SCH OF MUS PER LICE (NSC
options.ROYPD: ROYAL SCH OF MUSIC P DIP (NSC)

oapSchool.label: Which school did you attend last
oapSchool.note: 7593 SA schools (reference lookup, not a branch set). Popup has x_thefilter search box; filter e.g. SOSHANGUVE% to narrow. Stored as ITS school code, e.g. 1730=SOSHANGUVE SECONDARY SCHOOL.

oapPact.label: What are you currently doing?
oapPact.note: GATED BY APPLICANT TYPE: for endorsement CURRENTLY IN GR.12 the LOV returns ONLY one row 08=GRADE 12 PUPIL. Other applicant types (gap-year/working/completed) would expose more activity codes. Confirms endorsement branch filters downstream options.

oapPrevQualInd.label: Have you studied at Another institution previously?

branches.Yes: reveals two action buttons: oapCallPrevQual='Capture Previous Qualifications' and oapCallPrevSubj='Capture Previous Subjects' (each setRedirectTo -> separate sub-capture page for prior tertiary study)

pageE_qualifications._status: CAPTURED 2026-06-19: full faculty list (8) + complete programme catalogue (178 programmes across all 8 faculties, with ITS codes + eligibility tags) + academic year + oapECSLP programme-type + study period. Only oapOfferingType + oapBlock LOV options remain (minor, session expired before reading them). Captured for Curricular Courses + 2027 entry with Jane's 7-subject NSC.
pageE_qualifications.heading: Academic Application / Qualification details

oapAcademicYear.label: Academic Year
oapAcademicYear.onblur: eventRun(6.999) server validation; MUST be set first - it gates the faculty LOV. Setting via JS without the server round-trip completing can leave faculty LOV unauthorised.

oapECSLP.label: Are you applying for:
oapECSLP.onblur: eventRun(8.999) - MUST fire (select_option alone does not register it server-side; the faculty LOV stays empty until this onblur runs)
oapECSLP.note: GATES the faculty/programme catalogue. = programme-type switch.

oapFaculty.label: Limit your selection to a specific Faculty / College
oapFaculty.note: faculty/college selector; gated by oapECSLP + academic year; gates the programme LOV. For Curricular Courses + 2027, 8 faculties:

oapQualification.label: Choose a programme
oapQualification.note: the programme catalogue, gated by faculty (oapFaculty) + oapECSLP + year. Each row = ITS programme code + an eligibility tag '(ELIGIBLE TO APPLY-Y/N)' computed from the captured matric subjects + the programme name. Captured for Curricular Courses + 2027 with Jane's 7-subject NSC. Per-faculty lists:

18_ART_DESIGN_ARCHITECTURE.B8CD2Q: BA in Design in Communication Design

34_BUSINESS_ECONOMICS.D34FBQ: Diploma in Food and Beverage Operations

6_ENGINEERING_BUILT_ENVIRONMENT.B6UP0Q: Bachelor of Urban and Regional Planning

2_SCIENCE.B2E13Q: BSc Life&Env (Geog and Enviro Mgt) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2E19Q: BSc Life&Env (Zoology and Enviro Mgt) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2M40Q: BSc Math (Applied Maths and Comp Science)
2_SCIENCE.B2M57Q: BSc Math (Maths and Econ - Fin Orient)
2_SCIENCE.B2M55Q: BSc Math (Maths and Stats - Fin Orient)
2_SCIENCE.B2M56Q: BSc Math (Stats and Economics - Fin Orient)
2_SCIENCE.B2E40Q: BSc Maths (Applied Maths and Comp Sc) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2E42Q: BSc Maths (Applied Maths and Maths) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2E41Q: BSc Maths (Applied Maths and Stats) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2E44Q: BSc Maths (Maths and Comp Sc) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2E43Q: BSc Maths (Stats and Comp Science) Ext
2_SCIENCE.B2E73Q: BSc Physics (Physics and Applied Maths) Ext

16_HUMANITIES.B7026Q: BA with Specialisation in Language Practice

oapStudyPeriod.label: For which year of study are you applying?

oapOfferingType.label: How would you like to study for this programme?
oapOfferingType.note: Gated by programme + study period. Captured 2026-06-20 by sweeping all 8 faculties (C/E/S modes) and all study periods. UJ 2027 full set:
oapOfferingType._campus_key: APK=Auckland Park Kingsway (main), SWC=Soweto Campus, DFC=Doornfontein Campus, APB=Auckland Park Bunting Road. Extended = extended-curriculum (EA/ED). No distance-learning or part-time options appeared for 2027.

oapBlock.label: When would you like to study for the qualification?
oapBlock.note: Semester/term block. Captured 2026-06-20 — only one value appeared across all tested faculty/qualification/study-period/mode combinations for 2027. Year-block is the unit for all UJ undergraduate programmes on this portal.

oapApplType.label: Application Type and Description
oapApplType.note: auto-set to U (Undergraduate) when an undergraduate programme is chosen.

pageE_qualifications.save_button: next button on Page E (do NOT click final submit oapNextBtn8)
